title: Auto chat
description:
A auto chat mod.


A bit buggy because I made this for a pokemon server I played on!
body:
Includes:

Auto Chat
(Nothing else yet...)

How to Use "Auto Chat":
Open the mod settings using the mod menu.

Type the message you want to "auto chat" in the input field at the bottom.

Set a time interval by entering two numbers (e.g., between 2 and 5 seconds) into the small type fields.

The message will be sent randomly within the specified time range.

Click "Enable" to start.


PS:

I made the "auto chat" quickly for a server i play on so it might bug out.
